text: And when the kings of the Amorites on the other side of Jordan, who were in the mountain country, and in the plain, and in all the coast of the great sea, and those who were near Antilibanus, and the Chettites, and the Chananites, and the Pherezites, and the Evites, and the Amorites, and the Gergesites, and the Jebusites, heard ,

they came all together at the same time to make war against Joshua and Israel. had not been lifted up; and he offered there whole-burnt-offerings to the Lord, and a peace-offering. a copy of the law, the law of Moses, before the children of Israel. , who were half of them near mount Garizin, and half near mount Gæbal, as Moses the servant of the Lord commanded at first, to bless the people.
the loaves—we took them hot for our journey on the day on which we came out to come to you; and now they are dried and become mouldy.
the skins of wine which we filled when new, and they are rent; and our garments and our shoes are worn out because of the very long journey.
three days after they had made a covenant with them, they heard that they were near neighbours, and that they dwelt among them.
Gabaon, and Kephira, and Berot, and the cities of Jarin.
because of you, and we did this thing.
in your power; do to us as it is pleasing to you, and as it seems to you.
